name: Fired after reporting construction injury in West Jordan— is that legal?
description: Illegal retaliation; sue for it separately.

mainEntity.name: Fired after reporting construction injury in West Jordan— is that legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation; sue for it separately.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, retaliation is illegal under Utah law; file wrongful termination or interference claim alongside injury case.** Protected activity[4]. **Key factors:** 1. Timing proves retaliation. 2. Workers' comp anti-retaliation. 3. EEOC if discrimination. 4. Reinstatement/damages possible. Document all communications. Lawyer files charges timely.
